lines.hearsay: There was somebody at {place} counting days out loud.
lines.gossip: {A} announced to everyone at {place} that {B} was late with the iron again, and {B} let {A} finish — {A} says that every time, and {B} has never once said it back.
lines.report: {A} entered a complaint of late delivery against {B} at {place}, slot {slot}.
